articles.author: Anthony Faiola, Rachel Chason
articles.title: On Africa trip, the ‘quiet pope’ adopts a confident global voice - The Washington Post
articles.description: Pope Leo XIV shed his previous image as he denounced war in the Middle East and responded assertively to criticism by President Donald Trump.
articles.content: ROME Pope Leo XIV returned to the Vatican from a 11-day trip to Africa on Thursday with his papacy seemingly transformed a pontiff known during his first year for being tempered and at times careful … [+52 chars]
